passive.name: Concussive Blows
passive.description:
Braum's basic attacks apply Concussive Blows. Once the first stack is applied, ally basic attacks also stack Concussive Blows. 

Upon reaching 4 stacks, the target is stunned and takes magic damage. For the next few seconds they cannot receive new stacks, but take bonus magic damage from Braum's attacks.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Braum}} basic attacks and {{ai|Winter's Bite|Braum}} apply a stack of ''Concussive Blows''. Once the first stack is applied, allied champion {{tip|basic damage|basic attacks}} can also stack ''Concussive Blows''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: At maximum stacks, the target is {{tip|stun|stunned}} and takes {{as|magic damage}}. For the next few seconds they cannot receive new stacks, but take bonus {{as|magic damage}} from '''Braum's''' basic attacks.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Braum's''' [[basic attack]]s and ''{{ai|Winter's Bite|Braum}}'' each apply a [[stack]] of ''Concussive Blows'' to their target for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 4 times. Once the first stack has been applied, any allied {{tip|champion|champion's}} basic attack applies an additional stack to the target {{tip|on-hit}}.
wiki_detail.description2: The fourth stack against a target consumes them all to deal {{as|{{pp|26 to 196}}|magic damage}} {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun}} them for {{pp|changedisplay=true|1.25 to 1.75 for 3|1 to 13}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: This effect cannot apply to the same target more than once every few seconds. During this immunity period, affected targets take{{ft|{{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to 20% of the trigger damage|{{as|{{pp|26*0.2 to 196*0.2}} '''bonus''' magic damage}}}}from '''Braum's''' basic attacks.
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Concussive Blows'' won't be applied if the attack is {{tip|dodge|dodged}} or {{tip|block|blocked}} or if the attack {{tip|blind|misses}}.

Q.name: Winter's Bite
Q.description:
Braum propels freezing ice from his shield, slowing and dealing magic damage.

Applies a stack of Concussive Blows.
Q.tooltip:
Braum propels freezing ice from his shield, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing them by {{ e2 }}% decaying over {{ e5 }} seconds.

Applies a stack of Concussive Blows. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Braum}} propels freezing ice from his shield, {{tip|slow|slowing}} and dealing {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Braum''' propels ice from his shield in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 70% decaying over 2 seconds.

W.name: Stand Behind Me
W.description: Braum leaps to a target allied champion or minion. On arrival, Braum and the ally gain Armor and Magic Resist for a few seconds.
W.tooltip: Braum leaps to an allied champion or minion. On arrival, Braum grants the target {{ grantedallyarmor }} Armor and {{ grantedallymr }} Magic Resist for {{ e1 }} seconds. Braum grants himself {{ grantedbraumarmor }} Armor and {{ grantedbraummr }} Magic Resist for the same duration.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Braum}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} to a target allied {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|minion}}. On arrival, both of them gain {{sti|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|{{as|magic resistance}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Braum''' {{tip|dashes}} to put himself {{tt|between|150 units from his ally towards the closest enemy}} the target ally and the closest {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy {{tip|champion}} {{tt|within 1500 units|from the ally's location}}, and upon arrival grants himself and the ally {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}}} for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Ally Bonus Armor|{{ap|20 to 40}} {{as|(+ 12% '''bonus''' armor)}}}}
{{st|Ally Bonus Magic Resistance|{{ap|20 to 40}} {{as|(+ 12% '''bonus''' magic resistance)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Stand Behind Me'' can be [[Self-targeted|self cast]] to instantly grant '''Braum''' the '''bonus''' resistances.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Self Bonus Armor|{{ap|20 to 40}} {{as|(+ 36% '''bonus''' armor)}}}}
{{st|Self Bonus Magic Resistance|{{ap|20 to 40}} {{as|(+ 36% '''bonus''' magic resistance)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Stand Behind Me'' can be used on allied {{tip|minions}} but not on {{tip|ward|wards}} nor {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}}.
* If there are no nearby enemy champions, '''Braum''' will dash to land up-to 150 units on the far side of his target.
* The maximum dash range without enemy champions present is ~650. An enemy champion on the far side of the ally will allow '''Braum''' to dash a total of up-to 800 units.
* If {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} is cast during the dash, {{ai|Winter's Bite|Braum}} and {{ai|Glacial Fissure|Braum}} may also be cast.
* If the {{tip|dash}} is interrupted, neither '''Braum''' nor his ally receive the bonus resistances.

E.name: Unbreakable
E.description: Braum raises his shield in a direction for several seconds, intercepting all projectiles causing them to hit him and be destroyed. He negates the damage of the first attack completely and reduces the damage of all subsequent attacks from this direction.
E.tooltip:
Braum raises his shield for {{ e2 }} seconds, intercepting enemy missiles from the chosen direction, causing them to hit Braum and then be destroyed. The first missile Braum blocks deals no damage, and subsequent projectiles deal {{ e3 }}% reduced damage.

Braum gains {{ e4 }}% Move Speed while his shield is raised.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Braum}} sets his shield in a direction for a few seconds, intercepting any enemy {{tip|projectile|projectiles}} to hit him and be destroyed.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He gains damage reduction and negates the first instance of damage dealt by a champion completely from this direction.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Braum''' sets his shield in the target direction for a few seconds, creating a barrier that intercepts all incoming hostile {{tip|projectiles}} and reduces the damage '''Braum''' takes through it. The first instance of damage dealt by a {{tip|champion}} from this direction is reduced by 100%. ''Unbreakable'' does not affect {{tip|turret|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.description2: While his shield is raised, '''Braum''' also gains {{sti|ms|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} and {{tip|ghosting}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{sbc|Definitions}}
** {{sbc|Incoming:}} Damage sources coming from somewhere facing the shield. Those coming from different sides are not affected.
** {{sbc|Projectiles:}} Sped up entities not classified as a unit ({{tip|champions}}, {{tip|minions}}, {{tip|monsters}}, etc.)
** {{sbc|Intercepting:}} A projectile hitting '''Braum''' because he is standing in front of the intended target. In addition to being redirected, an intercepted projectile is also destroyed '''after''' hitting '''Braum''' (although this is only applicable to pass-through projectiles).
* ''Unbreakable's'' full damage reduction can block multiple instances of damage if they're dealt at the same time.
* Moving units do not count for being blocked by ''Unbreakable''. 
** [[Champion summoned units]] are not classified as units until they hit the ground (e.g. {{ai|Sapling Toss|Maokai}}) and thus will interact with ''Unbreakable'' whilst en route.
* Projectiles whose effects trigger on collision will still trigger - dealing damage, applying [[debuff]]s, creating area of effects and marking the target as 'hit'.
* Projectiles that create an [[area of effect]] upon their collision will still affect other units and not only '''Braum'''.
* Projectiles that '''cannot''' hit '''Braum''' or his allies (such as an enemy {{ai|Prismatic Barrier|Lux}}) will not be intercepted.<ref>[http://forums.na.leagueoflegends.com/board/showthread.php?t=4464736&page=2#post46663454 Unbreakable's interaction with Lux's Prismatic Barrier]</ref>
** {{cais|Starcall|Soraka}} ''Rejuvenation'' projectile is however blocked.
* The '''damage reduction''' will affect any source of damage whose origin is in front of the shield. This includes:
** All intercepted projectiles.
** {{tip|Melee}} and non-projectile-based {{tip|ranged}} attacks.
** Instantaneous [[direction-targeted]] abilities (e.g. {{ai|Arcanopulse|Xerath}}, {{ai|Final Spark|Lux}}, {{ai|Lifeform Disintegration Ray|Vel'Koz}}.)
** Instantaneously-placed [[ground-targeted]] abilities (e.g. {{ai|Lay Waste|Karthus}}, {{ai|Pillar of Flame|Brand}}, {{ai|Rupture|Cho'Gath}}) relative to the ability's center and '''not''' the caster's.
** Point-blank area-of-effects (e.g. {{ai|Ground Slam|Malphite}}, {{ai|Tantrum|Amumu}}, {{ai|Time Bomb|Zilean}} ''not'' targeted at '''Braum''')
** Instantaneous targeted abilities (e.g. {{ai|Malefic Visions|Malzahar}}, {{ai|Transfusion|Vladimir}}, {{ai|Time Bomb|Zilean}} targeted at '''Braum''') and {{tip|AoE DoT}} (e.g. {{ai|Spirit Fire|Nasus}}, {{ai|Tormented Shadow|Morgana}}, {{ai|Poison Trail|Singed}}).
* The damage reduction only benefits '''Braum'''.
* {{tip|Damage over time}} is calculated per tick but the full damage reduction will still only apply to a single tick.
* If the damage mitigated by ''Unbreakable'' exceeds a minimum threshold it is represented with floating text similar to the damage mitigated by shields ('{{sbc|-X}}')
** This floating text is always shown for the single fully-reduced damage source.
* '''Braum's''' facing direction is in the direction he's moving in.
* If '''Braum''' is protected by a {{tip|spell shield}}, both it and the one-time-use full damage reduction can be consumed by a single blockable spell.
** The one-time-use full damage reduction will not be consumed if the damage source is nothing but {{tip|true damage}}.
* ''Unbreakable'' will grant [[assist]] credit if the enemy whose damaging projectile is blocked from is killed within 10 seconds.

R.name: Glacial Fissure
R.description: Braum slams the ground, knocking up enemies nearby and in a line in front of him. A fissure is left along the line that slows enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Braum}} slams the ground, {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} enemies nearby and in a line in front of him. A fissure is left along the line that {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Braum''' leaps into the air and slams his shield into the ground, creating a fissure from the impact that travels forth in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within its path as well as those around '''Braum'''.
wiki_detail.description2: The first target hit is {{tip|airborne|knocked up}} for at least {{fd|0.6}} seconds, increased if they are further away from '''Braum'''. All other enemies hit are {{tip|airborne|knocked up}} for {{fd|0.6}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: A field of ice is created along the fissure's path, lasting for 4 seconds and {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies within the area every {{fd|0.25}} seconds. The field disappears after the duration ends in the same order and speed it was created with.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1200|Fissure missile knockup range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1200|Slow field length}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|230|Fissure missile width}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|170|Slow field width}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1400|Fissure missile speed; slow field segments spawning speed}}
